summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cipolatti Access Control System. Backend APIs fully functional with all new features working. Frontend has session management issues preventing full UI testing.

ui_bugs.issue: User session expires frequently during navigation, redirecting to login page

integration_issues.issue: Cannot navigate to Funcionários, Diretoria, Frota pages due to session expiration
Cannot test frontend uppercase conversion due to session management issues

passed_tests: All backend CRUD operations (visitors, fleet, employees, directors, carregamentos)
Backend uppercase conversion for license plates and names
Photo upload endpoint exists and validates correctly
Carregamentos page with correct tabs (Em Andamento, Agendados, Histórico)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session management - users are being logged out frequently during navigation, preventing full testing of module tabs and UI features. All backend functionality is working correctly.
